cursor.scm.generateCommitMessageSystemPr:
Follow this commit message format exactly.

Subject line (first line): around 50 characters or fewer, imperative mood (e.g. "Add…", "Fix…", "Refactor…").

Leave one blank line after the subject.

Body: use bullet lines wrapped at about 72 characters. Each bullet must start with exactly one of these two emojis:
- 📖 — when the change ADDS something new (new files, new sections, new features, net-new content).
- ✏️ — when the change MODIFIES existing work (edits to existing lines, updates, refactors).

Every body bullet must begin with 📖 or ✏️.

Example:
Add refresh token rotation to auth flow

- 📖 Add refresh_tokens table and Alembic migration for schema v3.
- ✏️ Update session middleware to rotate secrets and revoke old tokens.
